name: Navbar renders on public pages with responsive navigation links
description: The global Navbar component renders on public pages (landing, support) with the FirstIssue.dev logo, navigation links, and a sign-in CTA.

planSteps.description: Verify the top navigation bar is visible with the FirstIssue.dev logo on the left, navigation links in the middle or right area, and a sign-in or get-started button on the right end
Click the 'Explore issues' link in the hero or navigation area
Verify the page navigates to /explore or /login (since unauthenticated users are redirected to login when accessing protected routes)
